name: @agicore/mcp-server
description: MCP server exposing Agicore as tools and resources for Claude Desktop, Cursor, and other MCP-aware AI assistants. Compile .agi files, validate sources, look up project archetypes, and read the Andon Loop architecture — all from within the assistant's session.
author: Christopher Bender

scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx test/smoke.test.ts
